stories.title: The Missing Toy
stories.story:
Yara had a small brown teddy bear. She loved it very much and took it everywhere. One morning, Yara woke up and her teddy bear was not on her bed. She looked under the bed, but it was not there. She looked in the toy box, but it was not there either.

Yara felt sad. She asked her big brother, Sami, to help her look. Together, they checked the living room, the kitchen, and even the garden. Still no teddy bear!

Then Sami had an idea. "Did you take it to the car yesterday?" he asked. Yara's eyes got big. She remembered! She had taken her teddy bear to the shops with Mama. They ran to the car, and there it was, sitting on the back seat.

Yara hugged her teddy bear tight. "I will never lose you again," she said with a big smile.

stories.title: The New Puppy
stories.story:
The Hassan family got a new puppy. His name was Milo, and he was small and brown with big floppy ears. Everyone was so excited!

But Milo was not a perfect puppy. He chewed on shoes. He dug holes in the garden. He even ate one of Dad's socks! "This puppy is too naughty," said Dad one evening, shaking his head.

Omar, the youngest son, didn't agree. He spent every day with Milo, teaching him small tricks. Slowly, Milo learned to sit. Then he learned to stay. He even stopped chewing shoes!

One week later, Milo brought Dad his newspaper all by himself. Dad laughed and picked Milo up. "Maybe he isn't so naughty after all," Dad said. "He just needed someone patient, like you, Omar." From that day, Milo and Omar were the best of friends.
